overall.description: First-person walking footage through Los Santos International Airport in GTA V at night. The camera moves along the sidewalk under an elevated highway, passing vehicles and approaching the Fly US terminal entrance with escalators.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport access road sidewalk under elevated highway

events.description: green taxi passes by on the road from left to right
black sedan drives past on the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the airport road, passing under the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: green taxi driving past on the road, moving away from the airport

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning across the road overhead
modern glass and concrete terminal building with illuminated windows
tall street lamp illuminating the sidewalk with warm yellow light
large illuminated advertisement screen visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime airport access road with the camera walking along a concrete sidewalk. An elevated highway overpass spans overhead while the modern airport terminal building looms on the right. Street lamps cast pools of yellow light on the pavement as vehicles including a green taxi pass by on the road.

events.description: entering the covered area under the terminal overpass structure
pedestrian runs across the road from left to right in front of approaching vehicle

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk under the covered terminal structure, approaching the entrance area

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored clothing running across the road to reach the terminal entrance

entered.detail: blue highway sign indicating Airport Exit and Terminal directions with white text
illuminated hanging sign for Fly US airline suspended from the terminal structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the covered terminal structure where the Fly US airline sign becomes visible hanging overhead. A blue road sign indicates the airport exit and terminal directions. The environment becomes more enclosed as the terminal building draws closer on the right, and a pedestrian dashes across the road ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: terminal exterior walkway with support columns

events.description: escalator structure becomes visible through the terminal glass facade ahead

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered terminal canopy, passing concrete support pillars and approaching the entrance

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the terminal overpass structure
red and silver escalator visible through the terminal windows, leading to upper levels

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the terminal's covered walkway supported by massive concrete pillars, the camera approaches the main entrance. The Fly US sign moves to the left as the terminal facade dominates the right side. Through the glass windows, the red escalator structure becomes visible, indicating the entrance to the terminal proper.

events.description: red emergency vehicle passes by on the road to the left
arriving at the terminal entrance with glass doors and escalator access

agents.ego_description: approaching the terminal entrance, moving toward the escalator and glass facade

notable_agents.action: person standing near the escalator entrance at the terminal doors

entered.detail: large glass doors and windows forming the main terminal entrance with reflections
illuminated information screen displaying flight details or advertisements near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment arrives at the terminal entrance where the escalator structure dominates the right side. The camera moves toward the glass facade entrance with digital display screens visible. A red emergency vehicle passes on the road to the left as the environment transitions to the indoor terminal space with tiled flooring and overhead lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open nighttime airport access road into the enclosed entrance of the Fly US terminal. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway overpass, where yellow street lamps illuminate the pavement as a green taxi passes by. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed under a covered terminal structure, passing a blue directional road sign while a pedestrian dashes across the road ahead. The scene then shifts beneath a walkway supported by massive concrete pillars, where the terminal facade dominates the right side and a red escalator becomes visible through the glass windows. Finally, the camera approaches the glass facade and digital displays, passing a red emergency vehicle on the road before transitioning from the outdoor sidewalk into the indoor terminal space with tiled flooring and overhead lighting.
